title: Israeli Strikes On Tehran Airport: Airstrikes ignite planes, cause explosions; no casualties reported
summary_full: Israeli forces launched broad-scale strikes on targets in Tehran, including Mehrabad International Airport, with explosions reported across the city and surrounding areas. This escalation follows Iran's retaliatory missile and drone attacks against Israel and Gulf countries, intensifying the ongoing conflict in West Asia.
